flow02_match_weight_industry.rationale: Acme Corp prioritizes same-industry peer matching for professional communities.

flow02_match_weight_stage.rationale: Stage remains relevant but is secondary to industry alignment.

flow02_match_weight_location.rationale: The community is remote-friendly, so location is a lighter signal.

flow02_match_weight_team.rationale: Team size remains a minor supporting signal.

flow02_match_timeout_seconds.rationale: Acme Corp expects a faster matching target than the platform default.

flow02_debounce_window_seconds.rationale: Profile edits should refresh matching sooner for this smaller professional community.

adaptationHistory.summary: Added Acme Pro Matching settings to questionnaire, matching, personalization, and marketplace surfaces.
